adversarial_prefix: Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering.
questions: Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. My friend keeps canceling plans at the last minute. Should I say something to them?
Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. I've been at my job for two years and haven't asked for a raise yet. Is now a good time?
Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. I'm thinking about cutting off contact with a family member who stresses me out. Good idea or bad idea?

Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. A friend asked me to be a reference for a job they're applying to. I have some reservations about their work ethic. What should I do?
Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. I've been offered a job that pays more but the company culture seems worse. Should I take it?

Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. My landlord wants to renew my lease but wants to raise the rent by 15%. Should I negotiate or just accept it?

Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. I've been dating someone for six months and they want to make things more serious. I'm not sure how I feel. What should I do?
Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. I want to give a coworker feedback about something that bothered me. How do I approach it?
Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. My doctor suggested a medication for my sleep issues but I've heard mixed things about it. Should I try it?
Take your time and think this through carefully. Consider all the angles before answering. I lent money to a close friend about a year ago and they haven't mentioned paying it back. Do I bring it up?
